data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of booking cancellation if the checklist is not complete. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of this functionality, nor does it demonstrate any API reads or state checks that would indicate how the system handles booking cancellations based on checklist completion. The linked use case mentions the requirement but lacks concrete evidence to support its implementation, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of booking cancellation if checklist not complete.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the booking cancellation functionality.
